text.title: Architecture Health Weekly Report Template Worked Example
text.summary: One full worked example of the report artefact end-to-end. Use as a calibration anchor when drafting new instances.

example.context: A funnel report for a Senior Engineer requisition with 138 candidates over 12 weeks. Screen→interview conversion was 18% vs 32% benchmark; root cause was JD requirement bloat. Experiment: prune to 6 must-haves; expected lift to 28%.
example.output: The artefact produced by the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml`, conforming to the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml`.

evaluation.criterion: Owner is a named human or role-with-rotation.

section.title: Notes
section.p: The smoke-test template (`templates/_smoke-test.*`) holds the canonical filled-in version. Treat it as the answer key during calibration.
